title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Deloitte India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Deloitte India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Deloitte India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Deloitte India:
Deloitte India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deloitte India!
